# Qyvora studio — AI Frontend Studio

> Qyvora studio is a premium AI frontend studio led by Mehedi, an AI Frontend Engineer with 8+ years of experience. We engineer high-conversion websites and SaaS interfaces for AI startups, SaaS founders, and luxury real-estate brands worldwide using Next.js, Tailwind CSS v4, and conversion-first design. 120+ sites shipped across 14 countries.

## About

- Founder: Mehedi — AI Frontend Engineer & Studio Founder
- Stack: Next.js (App Router, RSC, Edge), Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, React, GSAP/Framer Motion
- Specialties: AI startup websites, SaaS frontend systems, landing page redesign, real-estate web development, Core Web Vitals optimization, SEO + AEO
- Performance standard: Lighthouse 95+, optimized LCP/INP/CLS
- Serves: Worldwide — USA, UK, Dubai, Canada, Australia, Germany, Singapore
- Contact: mehedihtml@gmail.com

## Core pages

- [Home](https://qyvora.vercel.app/): Overview of services, process, and results.
- [Services](https://qyvora.vercel.app/services): 12 productized frontend & AI services.
- [AI Startups](https://qyvora.vercel.app/services/ai-startups): Investor-grade AI product and landing surfaces.
- [Real Estate](https://qyvora.vercel.app/services/real-estate): Luxury property sites, IDX/MLS, map UX, lead gen.
- [Case Studies](https://qyvora.vercel.app/case-studies): Measurable conversion and ranking results.
- [Blog](https://qyvora.vercel.app/blog): Essays on AI frontend, conversion, and SEO/AEO.
- [About](https://qyvora.vercel.app/about): Background and approach.
- [Contact](https://qyvora.vercel.app/contact): Start a project (reply within 12 hours).
